summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BLOCK 5 (Multilanguage EN/BG) and BLOCK 6 (Moderation UI). Both blocks are mostly functional with minor issues in calculator translations and calculation display.

ui_bugs.issue: Language switching may not translate all page content properly
Calculation results not displaying after clicking calculate button

passed_tests: BLOCK 5: Language switcher BG/EN buttons present and functional
BLOCK 5: Navigation labels switch correctly between EN/BG
BLOCK 5: Language preference saved in localStorage
BLOCK 6: Moderation page accessible at /admin/moderation after login
BLOCK 6: Status filter works (pending_review, approved, published)
BLOCK 6: Empty state shown when no listings
BLOCK 6: Stats cards display counts per status (4 cards found)
Full system flow: Homepage -> Cars -> Calculator -> CRM navigation works
Admin login successful with JWT token
Backend API endpoints mostly functional (85.7% success rate)
Publishing queue endpoint working for moderation
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix calculator page translation integration and calculation results display. Calculator form accepts input but results are not showing after calculation.
